name: maintainerops
description: Self-hosted maintainer operations assistant for open source GitHub organizations.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/server && npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/web
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run dev --workspace @maintainerops/server
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run lint --workspace @maintainerops/server && npm run lint --workspace @maintainerops/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run test --workspace @maintainerops/server && npm run test --workspace @maintainerops/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run build --workspace @maintainerops/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @maintainerops/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @maintainerops/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
